records.question: Which customers living in Sauerberg, Hawaii exactly at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537, Apt. 245 have complaints with an outcome code of OK raised on or after 1987-07-11 14:40:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' AND complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '1987-07-11 14:40:30' AND customers.state = 'Hawaii' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 245' AND customers.town_city = 'Sauerberg'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join complaints on customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id where customers.address_line_1 = '039 jedidiah estate suite 537, apt. 245' and customers.town_city like '%sauerberg%' and customers.state like '%hawaii%' and complaints.complaint_outcome_code = 'OK' and complaints.date_complaint_raised >= '1987-07-11 14:40:30' limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by exact address and state, join with complaints to check for outcome code 'OK' and complaint date on or after the specified datetime.

records.question: Which customers with a good credit rating live at 039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537 in Hawaii, have the email cayla.satterfield@example.net, and have complained their product priced exactly 2.88 and first available on 1988-09-29 17:54:50 is unusable, with that product discontinued on or after 1987-12-20 13:46:16?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE complaints.complaint_type_code = 'Product Unusable' AND customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' AND products.date_product_first_available = '1988-09-29 17:54:50' AND products.product_price = 2.88 AND customers.address_line_1 = '039 Jedidiah Estate Suite 537' AND customers.email_address = 'cayla.satterfield@example.net' AND customers.state = 'Hawaii' AND products.date_product_discontinued >= '1987-12-20 13:46:16'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join complaints on customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id join products on complaints.product_id = products.product_id where lower(customers.address_line_1) like '%039 jedidiah estate suite 537%' and lower(customers.state) like '%hawaii%' and lower(customers.email_address) like '%cayla.satterfield@example.net%' and customers.customer_type_code = 'good credit rating' and products.product_price = 2.88 and products.date_product_first_available = '1988-09-29 17:54:50' and products.date_product_discontinued >= '1987-12-20 13:46:16' and lower(complaints.complaint_type_code) like '%unusable%' limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers by address, state, email, and customer_type_code for good credit rating, join complaints and products to filter by product price, availability, discontinuation date, and complaint type indicating unusable product.

records.question: Who are the customers with the phone number 044-468-4549 and a Good Credit Rating?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.phone_number = '044-468-4549' AND customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers where customers.phone_number = '044-468-4549' and lower(customers.customer_type_code) like '%good credit rating%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter customers by exact phone number and customer type code indicating Good Credit Rating, then select their customer_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Which customers living in Apt. 495 have open complaints?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
WHERE complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND customers.address_line_2 = 'Apt. 495'
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join complaints on customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id where lower(customers.address_line_1) like '%apt. 495%' and complaints.complaint_status_code = 'open' limit 5;
records.thought: To find customers living in 'Apt. 495' with open complaints, join Customers and Complaints on customer_id, filter address_line_1 for 'apt. 495' and complaint_status_code indicating open complaints.

records.question: Which customers from Tennessee with a Good Credit Rating have complained about Chocolate products in the Food category priced at most 2.88?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE customers.state = 'Tennessee' AND products.product_category_code = 'Food' AND customers.customer_type_code = 'Good Credit Rating' AND products.product_name = 'Chocolate' AND products.product_price <= 2.88
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join complaints on customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id join products on complaints.product_id = products.product_id where lower(customers.state) like '%tennessee%' and lower(customers.customer_type_code) like '%good credit rating%' and lower(products.product_category_code) like '%food%' and lower(products.product_name) like '%chocolate%' and products.product_price <= 2.88 limit 5
records.thought: Filter customers from Tennessee with Good Credit Rating, join complaints and products to find those who complained about Chocolate products in the Food category priced at most 2.88.

records.question: Who are the customers with open complaints about products priced at most 2.88?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN complaints ON customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id
JOIN products ON complaints.product_id = products.product_id
WHERE complaints.complaint_status_code = 'Open' AND products.product_price <= 2.88
records.pred_sql: select customers.customer_id from customers join complaints on customers.customer_id = complaints.customer_id join products on complaints.product_id = products.product_id where complaints.complaint_status_code like '%open%' and products.product_price <= 2.88 limit 5;
